scripts.test: node --test tests/analytics-consent.test.mjs && node tests/homepage-smoke.test.mjs && node tests/routes.test.mjs && node tests/markdown-parser.test.mjs && node tests/new-post.test.mjs && node tests/admin-server.test.mjs && node tests/timeline-state.test.mjs && node tests/comments-api.test.mjs && node --test tests/sso-auth-ui.test.mjs tests/sso-client.test.mjs tests/sso-middleware.test.mjs tests/sso-routes.test.mjs tests/sso-workbench.test.mjs
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx --yes wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name xgblog --branch main --commit-dirty=true
